instructions: Resolve every required input before side effects.
Stop when a required capability is denied, unsupported, or awaiting approval.
Stay within the project or an explicitly approved artifact root.
Preserve the named output contract and report skipped validation honestly.
Do not publish externally, mutate user scope, or rewrite Git history.

behaviorContract.purpose: Provide a short factual closure summary without making new changes or decisions.

inputs.name: WORK_SUMMARY
inputs.description: Completed work context; current task context may satisfy this input explicitly.

when.condition: No limitations are known from evidence.

decisionTable.action: Use the exact statement No known limitations.

invariants: Do not modify code or configuration.
Do not introduce new decisions or work claims.
stopConditions: WORK_SUMMARY cannot be resolved from explicit input or current task evidence.
Completion claims cannot be supported by evidence.

workflowSteps.action: List known limitations or the exact no-known-limitations statement.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Do not add follow-up implementation, release, or new scope.

fields.name: Limitations
fields.description: Known limits or exact absence statement.

validation: Confirm claims match actual completed evidence.
Confirm no new work or decision is introduced.

claimBoundary: Behavior-complete machine-readable contract generated from the canonical behavior IR; the Skill contains the same generated contract plus explanatory authored guidance.
